texto: When the faith is strong enough, it is sufficient just to be. It's a journey towards simplicity, towards quietness, towards a kind of joy that is not in time. It's a journey that has taken us from primary identification with our body and our psyche, on to an identification with God, and ultimately beyond identification.

texto: When I look at relationships, my own and others, I see a wide range of reasons for people to be together and ways in which they are together.
